description: Backend data contract for Subjects page – manage curriculum subjects with stats, CRUD, filtering, sorting, and export.

getStats.description: Get summary statistics for the dashboard cards (total subjects, active subjects, total weekly periods, classes covered).

data.totalPeriodsPerWeek: number (sum of periodsPerWeek across all subjects)

getSubjects.description: Fetch paginated list of subjects with filtering, search, and sorting.

queryParams.status: enum: All, Active, Inactive (optional, default All)
queryParams.sortBy: enum: Name, Code, Periods (optional, default Name)
queryParams.sortOrder: enum: asc, desc (default asc for Name/Code, desc for Periods)

getSubjectById.description: Get full details of a single subject.

createSubject.description: Create a new subject. Returns the created subject with generated ID.

400.message: Missing required fields or invalid periodsPerWeek value

409.message: Subject name or code already exists

updateSubject.description: Update an existing subject. Partial updates allowed (PATCH semantics).

deleteSubject.description: Delete a subject. If the subject is assigned to classes/teachers, return a warning but still allow deletion? (Prefer soft delete: set status = 'Inactive' instead.) The frontend uses hard delete for now.

409.message: Cannot delete subject because it is assigned to teachers or classes

getFilterOptions.description: Available statuses for filter dropdown (static, but can be dynamic).

exportSubjects.description: Export filtered subjects as CSV (same query params as getSubjects, pagination ignored).
exportSubjects.response: CSV file download with columns: id, name, code, description, teachers, classes (comma-separated), periodsPerWeek, status

fieldNotes.teachers: Count of staff members assigned to teach this subject. This is computed by the backend based on teacher-subject assignments. Not editable directly on the subject form.
fieldNotes.classes: Array of class-section identifiers where the subject is taught (e.g., 'Cls 8-A'). Derived from timetable assignments.
fieldNotes.code: Short uppercase identifier, unique per subject. Used in reports and exports.
fieldNotes.periodsPerWeek: Default number of periods scheduled per week across all classes. Can be overridden per class in the timetable module.
fieldNotes.description: Optional free-text description of the subject.
